title: orchiodes foliosum
intro: Orchiodes foliosum, also known as the Autumn Lady's Tresses, is a terrestrial orchid species found in the mountainous regions of Europe, Asia, and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting kidney function. The herbal preparations of Orchiodes foliosum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although its effectiveness and safety need further scientific evaluation.
